title: RoseNode
description: Atomic unit of knowledge in the Rose Forest knowledge commons. A signed, embedded piece of content with mandatory provenance metadata.

embedding.description: Vector embedding of the content, dimension in [32, 4096]

model_card_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the model card, prefixed with sha256:

metadata.description: Key-value metadata. Must include model_id and model_card_hash.

$comment: Invariants: INV-RN-001 (license enum), INV-RN-002 (embedding dim), INV-RN-003 (model_id required), INV-RN-004 (model_card_hash sha256: prefix)
